title: rhododendron hangzhouense
intro: Rhododendron hangzhouense, also known as Hangzhou azalea, is a species of flowering plant in the rhododendron family, native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rhododendron hangzhouense include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in poultices or salves to apply topically for skin issues.
